creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: fernape
Date: Wed Nov  4 15:01:09 UTC 2020
New revision: 554087
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/554087

Log:
  sysutils/duf: Update to 0.5.0

  From ChangeLog: https://github.com/muesli/duf/releases/v0.5.0

  Fixed
   * Hide overlay/shm filesystems per default

  Added
   * Add support for path arguments to filter output
   * Add --only flag to show only specific device groups (#80)
   * Add --warning option

  Changes
   * Replace individual hide flags with a generic --hide
   * Add nsfs to special devices

  PR:	250838
  Submitted by:	vulcan@wired.sh (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/sysutils/duf/Makefile
  head/sysutils/duf/distinfo
